title: i_am_admin recomputed inline 4 times — same expression, 4 copies
description: online.first().map(|s| s.as_str()) == Some(my_pub_id.as_str()) appears in the DirectoryList, UserLeft, KeyPackageReady, and KeyPackageResponse handlers — 4 separate copies of the same comparison. When the admin election rule changes (or online changes to Vec<UserInfo>), all 4 must be updated. Suggested rewrite: extract as a named closure or macro before the select! loop: let is_admin = || online.first().map(String::as_str) == Some(my_pub_id.as_str()); then call is_admin() at each site. Single point of change, intent is explicit.
